name: Sarah Chen
bio: Roommates for 3 years at NYU. She's now a UX designer in Seattle and we still text about bad reality TV.

name: Marcus Johnson
bio: Former coworker from my first job. We hit the gym together every Saturday morning when schedules line up.

name: Priya Patel
bio: Known each other since 3rd grade. Her parents and mine are still neighbors back home.

name: Diego Ramirez
bio: Met in a shared dorm during freshman year. Love hiking together and planning weekend backpacking trips.

name: Aisha Bello
bio: We started a two-person book club during the pandemic and never stopped. Currently reading through Toni Morrison's novels.

name: Tom O'Sullivan
bio: Study abroad buddy from our semester in Dublin. We promised to visit each other's home countries and are way overdue.

name: Yuki Tanaka
bio: My mentor at my first tech internship. She still gives me great career advice over coffee calls.

name: Ben Whitfield
bio: Lives two doors down. We grill out together most weekends and he waters my plants when I travel.
